overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character web-swinging through a snowy Manhattan skyline. The character performs acrobatic aerial maneuvers between skyscrapers, executes a vertical wall-run up an art deco tower, and dives from the summit before swinging past a prominent gothic cathedral.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered urban canyon between midtown skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: web-swinging between tall buildings using web lines attached to skyscrapers, performing acrobatic flips and dives

entered.detail: Modern glass and steel office tower with reflective windows
Tall art deco skyscraper with setbacks and stone facade that will be climbed later
Distinctive needle-like spire visible in the distant skyline
Yellow tower crane visible between buildings in the distance
Large park area covered in snow with bare trees visible below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Spider-Man swinging through a snowy urban canyon surrounded by glass and stone skyscrapers. The camera follows the character as he arcs between buildings high above sparse street traffic, with a snow-covered park visible to the right and construction cranes dotting the distant skyline.

events.description: transitions from horizontal web-swinging to vertical wall-running up building facade

agents.ego_description: running vertically up the art deco building facade using wall-crawling ability, moving from street level toward the roof

entered.detail: Detailed stone facade with geometric patterns and tall windows of the building being climbed
Classic wooden water tower visible on adjacent building roof

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from swinging to running vertically up the facade of the art deco skyscraper. The camera tilts upward following the rapid ascent, showing the detailed stonework and window patterns of the building as the character climbs toward the upper setbacks.

events.description: reaches building summit and launches into freefall dive toward the streets below

agents.ego_description: scales the final architectural setbacks of the tower, reaches the metal radio antenna at the summit, then launches backward into a dramatic freefall

entered.detail: Metal lattice communication tower with multiple antenna arrays at the building's peak
Art deco spire structure with geometric crown at the tower's summit

segments.scene_description: The character climbs past the upper setbacks of the art deco tower, reaching the metal radio antenna and ornamental spire at the summit. After a brief moment at the top, the character launches backward into a dramatic freefall dive, transitioning the perspective to show the expansive cityscape rushing upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude aerial traversal with cathedral landmark

events.description: swings past prominent gothic cathedral with distinctive flying buttresses and twin spires

agents.ego_description: recovers from the dive and resumes high-speed web-swinging, navigating around the cathedral structure and maintaining momentum between skyscrapers

entered.detail: Large gothic revival cathedral with pointed arches, flying buttresses, and intricate stone tracery
Twin stone spires rising above the cathedral's main facade

segments.scene_description: Recovering from the dive, the character swings at high altitude through the city skyline, eventually passing a prominent gothic cathedral with intricate spires and flying buttresses. The segment showcases expansive views of the snow-covered Manhattan cityscape as the character maintains high velocity between the skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high-speed swing through a snowy urban canyon to a vertical ascent and a final expansive dive across the Manhattan skyline. It begins with Spider-Man arcing between glass and stone skyscrapers high above sparse street traffic and a snow-covered park. As the momentum shifts, the camera tilts upward to follow the character running vertically up the detailed stonework of an art deco tower toward its ornamental spire. The scene then reaches a peak at the summit's radio antenna before launching into a dramatic backward freefall, causing the cityscape to rush upward in a sudden shift of perspective. Finally, the camera recovers from the dive to track the character swinging at high altitude past the intricate spires of a gothic cathedral against the backdrop of the sprawling, snow-dusted city.
